option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.*?>
<HBox xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="piJava.Controllers.frontoffice.FrontDashboardController" stylesheets="@dashboard.css" prefWidth="1400" prefHeight="860" styleClass="root-bg">
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" styleClass="page-scroll" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS">
<VBox spacing="22" styleClass="main-container"> <!-- HEADER --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16"> <VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" spacing="4"> <Label text="Tableau de bord" styleClass="title"/> <Label text="ESPRIT Flow · Année académique 2024–2025" styleClass="subtitle"/> </VBox> <Button text="＋ Nouvel étudiant" styleClass="btn-primary"/> </HBox>
<!-- 4 STAT CARDS IMPORTANT: each card uses ONE styleClass only (e.g. "red-card"). Do NOT add "card" as a second class — it causes a specificity conflict that overwrites the gradient with a plain gray fill. --> <HBox spacing="16">
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card"> <Label text=" Total Étudiants" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="1 284" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="+24 ce mois-ci" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card-light"> <Label text=" Classes" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="24" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="+3 cette semaine" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card-mid"> <Label text="‍ Enseignants" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="86" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="Permanents" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card-soft"> <Label text=" Matières" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="32" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="Programmes actifs" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
</HBox>
<!-- CHART + SIDE PANEL ROW --> <HBox spacing="16" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" styleClass="panel"> <Label text="Inscriptions mensuelles" styleClass="panel-title"/> <BarChart fx:id="enrollmentChart" prefHeight="260" styleClass="chart" animated="true"> <xAxis><CategoryAxis/></xAxis> <yAxis><NumberAxis/></yAxis> </BarChart> </VBox>
<VBox prefWidth="260" spacing="14" styleClass="panel"> <Label text="Répartition par filière" styleClass="panel-title"/>
<VBox spacing="10"> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-red"/> <Label text="Génie Logiciel" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="34%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-red2"/> <Label text="Data Science" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="22%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-red3"/> <Label text="Réseaux Télécom" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="18%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-pink"/> <Label text="Business IT" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="15%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-gray"/> <Label text="Autres" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="11%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> </VBox>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<VBox spacing="8" styleClass="mini-stat-box"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8"> <Label text="Taux de présence" styleClass="mini-stat-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="87%" styleClass="mini-stat-value"/> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8"> <Label text="Taux de réussite" styleClass="mini-stat-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="91%" styleClass="mini-stat-value"/> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8"> <Label text="Étudiants actifs" styleClass="mini-stat-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="1 201" styleClass="mini-stat-value"/> </HBox> </VBox>
</VBox> </HBox>
<!-- STUDENTS TABLE --> <VBox styleClass="panel"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12"> <Label text="Étudiants récents" styleClass="panel-title" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Voir tout →" styleClass="btn-ghost"/> </HBox>
<TableView fx:id="studentsTable" prefHeight="200" styleClass="table"> <columns> <TableColumn text="Nom" prefWidth="220"/> <TableColumn text="Classe" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn text="Filière" prefWidth="180"/> <TableColumn text="Présence" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn text="Statut" prefWidth="120"/> </columns> </TableView> </VBox>
</VBox> </ScrollPane>
</HBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.chart.*?>
<HBox xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="piJava.Controllers.frontoffice.FrontDashboardController" stylesheets="@dashboard.css" prefWidth="1400" prefHeight="860" styleClass="root-bg">
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" styleClass="page-scroll" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS">
<VBox spacing="22" styleClass="main-container"> <!-- HEADER --> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="16"> <VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" spacing="4"> <Label text="Tableau de bord" styleClass="title"/> <Label text="ESPRIT Flow · Année académique 2024–2025" styleClass="subtitle"/> </VBox> <Button text="＋ Nouvel étudiant" styleClass="btn-primary"/> </HBox>
<!-- 4 STAT CARDS IMPORTANT: each card uses ONE styleClass only (e.g. "red-card"). Do NOT add "card" as a second class — it causes a specificity conflict that overwrites the gradient with a plain gray fill. --> <HBox spacing="16">
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card"> <Label text=" Total Étudiants" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="1 284" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="+24 ce mois-ci" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card-light"> <Label text=" Classes" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="24" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="+3 cette semaine" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card-mid"> <Label text="‍ Enseignants" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="86" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="Permanents" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" prefHeight="130" spacing="6" alignment="TOP_LEFT" styleClass="red-card-soft"> <Label text=" Matières" styleClass="card-label"/> <Label text="32" styleClass="card-number"/> <Label text="Programmes actifs" styleClass="card-sub"/> </VBox>
</HBox>
<!-- CHART + SIDE PANEL ROW --> <HBox spacing="16" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS">
<VBox HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" styleClass="panel"> <Label text="Inscriptions mensuelles" styleClass="panel-title"/> <BarChart fx:id="enrollmentChart" prefHeight="260" styleClass="chart" animated="true"> <xAxis><CategoryAxis/></xAxis> <yAxis><NumberAxis/></yAxis> </BarChart> </VBox>
<VBox prefWidth="260" spacing="14" styleClass="panel"> <Label text="Répartition par filière" styleClass="panel-title"/>
<VBox spacing="10"> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-red"/> <Label text="Génie Logiciel" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="34%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-red2"/> <Label text="Data Science" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="22%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-red3"/> <Label text="Réseaux Télécom" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="18%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-pink"/> <Label text="Business IT" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="15%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> <HBox spacing="10" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="●" styleClass="dot-gray"/> <Label text="Autres" styleClass="filiere-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="11%" styleClass="filiere-pct"/> </HBox> </VBox>
<Region VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"/>
<VBox spacing="8" styleClass="mini-stat-box"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8"> <Label text="Taux de présence" styleClass="mini-stat-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="87%" styleClass="mini-stat-value"/> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8"> <Label text="Taux de réussite" styleClass="mini-stat-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="91%" styleClass="mini-stat-value"/> </HBox> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="8"> <Label text="Étudiants actifs" styleClass="mini-stat-label" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="1 201" styleClass="mini-stat-value"/> </HBox> </VBox>
</VBox> </HBox>
<!-- STUDENTS TABLE --> <VBox styleClass="panel"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12"> <Label text="Étudiants récents" styleClass="panel-title" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Voir tout →" styleClass="btn-ghost"/> </HBox>
<TableView fx:id="studentsTable" prefHeight="200" styleClass="table"> <columns> <TableColumn fx:id="nameCol" text="Nom" prefWidth="220"/> <TableColumn fx:id="gradeCol" text="Classe" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn fx:id="courseCol" text="Filière" prefWidth="180"/> <TableColumn fx:id="attendanceCol" text="Présence" prefWidth="120"/> <TableColumn fx:id="statusCol" text="Statut" prefWidth="120"/> </columns> </TableView> </VBox>
</VBox> </ScrollPane>
</HBox>
